data.title: DWF Labs Partner Calls For Thorough Investigation Into Bybit Hack
data.description: According to Odaily, Andrei Grachev, a partner at DWF Labs, expressed concerns on the X platform regarding the severity of the recent security breach at Bybit. Grachev emphasized the need for a comprehensive investigation into the incident. He noted that DWF Labs has not withdrawn any funds from Bybit_Official and is prepared to offer ETH support. Additionally, Grachev expressed curiosity about the actions of Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin, recalling his role in advocating for an ETH rollback following The DAO fork incident a decade ago.

data.title: Bybit CEO: All withdrawals have been processed, the withdrawal system has returned to normal, and a full report will be released later
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Bybit co-founder and CEO Ben Zhou posted on X platform, "12 hours after the worst hacker attack in history. All withdrawals have been processed. Bybit withdrawal system is now fully back to normal, users can withdraw any amount without any delay. Thank you for your patience, Bybit is sorry for this situation. Bybit will release a full incident report and security measures in the next few days. We will continue to inform you of updates. Thank you to all the customers, friends and partners who helped us and supported us during this torturous 12 hours.
The real work has just begun."

data.title: Bybit hacker has become the world's 14th largest ETH holder
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Coinbase director Conor Grogan posted on X that according to Arkham platform monitoring data, Bybit hackers (most likely from North Korea) have become the 14th largest ETH holder in the world. They hold about 0.42% of the total supply of Ethereum, exceeding Fidelity and Vitalik's Ethereum holdings, and more than twice the Ethereum Foundation's ETH holdings.

data.title: Arthur Hayes asks Vitalik: Do you support Ethereum rollback to help Bybit? ETH is no longer a currency after The DAO fork
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: In response to the theft of more than $1.5 billion in assets from Bybit, BitMEX founder Arthur Hayes posted a question to Ethereum co-founder Vitalik on the X platform, saying, "Will you support rolling back the Ethereum chain to help Bybit? As an ETH whale holder, my view is that ETH is no longer a currency after the hard fork of The DAO hacker in 2016. If the community wants to do it again, I will support it, because we voted against immutability in 2016, why not do it again? No one has raised questions about DeFi operations on CZ's computer (referring to BNB), why not question ETH (that is, Vitalik Buterin's computer)?"

data.title: DWF Labs partner: No withdrawals from Bybit and willing to provide ETH support, curious about what Vitalik will do
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: DWF Labs partner Andrei Grachev posted on the X platform, "The Bybit hacking security incident is extremely serious and must be properly investigated. DWF Labs has not made any withdrawals from Bybit_Official and is ready to provide it with ETH support. In addition, I am very curious about what Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin will do. After all, he pushed for the ETH rollback after The DAO fork ten years ago."

data.title: Kanye West: Official Meme Coin will be launched next week, and the tokens on the market are fake projects
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Well-known rapper Kanye West posted on the X platform that all related Meme coins currently on the market are fake, and he will launch his own official Meme coin next week.

data.title: Santiment: Affected by factors such as the Bybit theft and the issuance of LIBRA, the market is in extreme fear
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Santiment posted on the X platform that due to the shock caused by the Bybit hack in the encryption field, coupled with the worrying news about LIBRA and other contributing factors this week, the crowd showed extreme fear as Bitcoin plummeted. According to the sentiment score, the negative sentiment in the encryption community is the same as before the price rebound on February 17 and 18. While nothing is certain, and a major exchange hack may have a lasting impact on the crowd's perception, remember that the market almost always moves in the opposite direction of what retail traders expect.

data.title: A whale or institution transferred 11,800 ETH from Binance to Bybit 6 hours ago, worth $31 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to LookonChain monitoring, 6 hours ago, a whale or institution transferred 11,800 ETH (worth 31 million US dollars) from Binance to Bybit's cold wallet as support for Bybit customer withdrawals.

data.title: Nillion: Mainnet launch postponed to March
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Privacy and security computing network Nillion officially announced on the X platform that the release of Nillion mainnet has been postponed to March.

data.title: Zora launches post tokenization feature, with a single token supply of 1 billion, and creators automatically receive 10 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Zora officially announced on the X platform that it has launched the post tokenization function on the Zora platform. Each post can correspond to one token, with a supply of 1 billion. Creators automatically receive 10 million tokens when they publish, and creators can earn 1% from each transaction. The tokens are for entertainment only and have been launched on the website and beta mobile APP.
